prompt: Transform the upward and downward arrows into stylized rocket and anchor symbols respectively to represent growth and decline.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1, the 'Sales QoQ' chart. Transform each green upward-pointing arrow (including its vertical line) into a stylized green rocket symbol. Ensure each rocket symbol is vertically oriented and its length corresponds to the original arrow's length, representing growth. Similarly, transform each red downward-pointing arrow (including its vertical line) into a stylized red anchor symbol. Ensure each anchor symbol is vertically oriented and its length corresponds to the original arrow's length, representing decline.
objects: Green stylized rocket symbol representing +140% growth
Green stylized rocket symbol representing +78% growth
Red stylized anchor symbol representing -81% decline
Red stylized anchor symbol representing -5% decline
Red stylized anchor symbol representing -24% decline
Red stylized anchor symbol representing -3% decline
Numerical values for growth and decline (e.g., percentages and M values)
X-axis labels (Velo, Montana, Carretera, VTT, Paseo, Amarilla)
